quizzes.title: Quiz 1: Hiragana あ～そ
quizzes.what_it_covers: Hiragana characters a-so row (あ、い、う、え、お、か、き、く、け、こ、さ、し、す、せ、そ)

quizzes.title: Quiz 2: Hiragana あ～ほ
quizzes.what_it_covers: Hiragana characters a-ho rows (all basic hiragana through は行)

quizzes.title: Quiz 3: All hiragana
quizzes.what_it_covers: All basic hiragana characters (あ～ん)

quizzes.title: Quiz 4: Hiragana with voiced consonants
quizzes.what_it_covers: Hiragana with voiced consonants (Textbook p.18) e.g. 'ka-gi' to かぎ — dakuten characters (が、ざ、だ、ば行) and handakuten (ぱ行)

quizzes.title: Quiz 5: Hiragana with double consonants
quizzes.what_it_covers: Hiragana with double consonants (small つ p.25) e.g. 'ha-p-pa' to はっぱ — sokuon (っ) usage
quizzes.format_clues: dictation — hear romaji, write hiragana with small tsu

quizzes.title: Quiz 6: Hiragana with glides
quizzes.what_it_covers: Hiragana with glides (small や、ゆ、よ p.25) e.g. 'kyo-u' to きょう — combination characters (きゃ、しゅ、ちょ etc.)
quizzes.format_clues: dictation — hear romaji, write hiragana with glides

quizzes.title: Quiz 7: Ch. 2 Vocab. 1
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 2 Vocab list 1 on Canvas — dictation & meaning
quizzes.format_clues: dictation & meaning — hear word, write hiragana and English meaning

quizzes.title: Quiz 8: Ch. 2 Vocab. 2
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 2 Vocab list 2 on Canvas — dictation & meaning
quizzes.format_clues: dictation & meaning — hear word, write hiragana and English meaning

quizzes.title: Quiz 9: Ch. 3 Vocab. 1
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 3 Vocab 1 — Verbs from あります to べんきょうします (pp.85-86). No dictation, write the words.
quizzes.format_clues: no dictation — write the words (see vocab list, produce hiragana from English/meaning)

quizzes.title: Quiz 10: Ch. 3 Vocab. 2
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 3 Vocab 2 — Daily activities from おきます to うちにかえります (pp.88-89). No dictation, write the words.

quizzes.title: Quiz 11: Ch. 3 Vocab. 3
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 3 Vocab 3 — Time Expressions from あさ to つぎ (pp.84-85). No dictation, write the words.

quizzes.title: Quiz 12: Ch. 4 Vocab. 1
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 4 Vocab 1 — Nouns (pp.124-125). No dictation, write the words.

quizzes.title: Quiz 13: Ch. 4 Vocab. 2
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 4 Vocab 2 — Adjectives (pp.125-126). No dictation, write the words.

quizzes.title: Quiz 14: Katakana ア～ト
quizzes.what_it_covers: Katakana characters ア through ト (a-to rows)

quizzes.title: Quiz 15: Ch. 4 Adjective conjugation
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 4 Adjective conjugation (SAM p.100) — i-adjective and na-adjective polite forms
quizzes.format_clues: conjugation — conjugate adjectives into polite present forms

quizzes.title: Quiz 16: Katakana ア～ホ
quizzes.what_it_covers: Katakana characters ア through ホ (all katakana through ha-row)

quizzes.title: Quiz 17: Ch. 4 Kanji
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 4 Kanji — 大、学、校、先、生 (p.161)

quizzes.title: Quiz 18: All katakana
quizzes.what_it_covers: All katakana characters (ア～ン) including voiced, double consonants, and glides

quizzes.title: Quiz 19: Ch. 5 Vocab.
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 5 Vocabulary (Textbook p.170)

quizzes.title: Quiz 20: Ch. 5 Kanji
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 5 Kanji — 山、川、田、人、上、中、下、小、日、本 (p.204)

quizzes.title: Quiz 21: Ch. 6 Vocab. 1
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 6 Vocab 1 — Household chores and other activities (p.213)

quizzes.title: Quiz 22: Ch. 6 Vocab. 2
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 6 Vocab 2 — Things to do on a day off (pp.215-216)

quizzes.title: Quiz 23: Ch. 6 Kanji
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 6 Kanji — 今、私、月、火、水、木、金、土、曜、何、週、末、休 (pp.243-244)

quizzes.title: Quiz 24: Ch. 6 Polite past adjectives and the copula verb です
quizzes.what_it_covers: Ch. 6 Polite past adjectives and the copula verb です (SAM p.161) — adjective past tense conjugation
quizzes.format_clues: conjugation — conjugate adjectives into polite past forms

exams.title: Mid-term Ch.1-Ch.3
exams.what_it_covers: Chapters 1-3: Hiragana (all), greetings/introductions vocabulary and grammar, daily routines vocabulary and grammar

exams.title: Oral Examination
exams.what_it_covers: Oral exam covering conversational Japanese from Ch.1-Ch.6. Practice session on 4/17 (Friday).

exams.title: Final Examination
exams.what_it_covers: Comprehensive final exam Ch.1-Ch.6. Time: 10:00-12:00, Room: AHS 188

weekly_content.title: Ch.1 The Japanese Sound System and Hiragana
content: Forms of address, daily greetings, useful expressions

weekly_content.title: Ch.1 continued — Long vowels, double consonants, glides
content: Reading hiragana / useful expressions / conversation practice (pp.24-28)

weekly_content.title: Ch.2 Greetings and Introductions
content: G2: ～は～ですか (はい/いいえ questions) pp.50-52
G4: Question words for personal information pp.56-60
grammar: G1: ～は～です (identifying)
G2: ～は～ですか (yes/no questions)
G3: の (noun relationships)
G4: Question words (なに、だれ、なん etc.)

weekly_content.title: Ch.2 continued — も, reading, culture
grammar: G5: も (similarities/also)

weekly_content.title: Ch.3 Daily Routines
content: G1: Polite present form of verbs, particles に、へ、を、で pp.98-102
G2: ～が あります (presenting objects/events) pp.103-105
G3: Telling time using particle に pp.106-110
G4: Adverbs for frequency of action pp.111-113
grammar: G1: Polite present verb form + particles に、へ、を、で
G2: ～が あります (existence of objects/events)
G3: Time + に (telling time)
G4: Frequency adverbs (よく、ときどき、あまり etc.)

weekly_content.title: Ch.3 continued — Past tense verbs, reading, culture
content: G5: Polite past form of verbs pp.114-116
grammar: G5: Polite past form of verbs (～ました／～ませんでした)

weekly_content.title: Midterm + Katakana + Ch.4 Japanese Cities begins
content: G1: これ、それ、あれ、どれ (demonstrative pronouns) pp.136-141
grammar: G1: これ、それ、あれ、どれ (demonstratives for things)

weekly_content.title: Ch.4 — Locations, adjectives, ね/よ
content: G2: ～は～にあります/います + ここ、そこ、あそこ (locations) pp.142-145
G3: Adjectives + noun, polite present forms of adjectives pp.146-150
G4: ～に～があります/います (describing locations) pp.151-154
G5: ね and よ (sentence-ending particles) pp.155-157
grammar: G2: ～は～にあります/います + location words (ここ、そこ、あそこ)
G3: Adjective + noun, polite present adjective forms (i-adj, na-adj)
G4: ～に～があります/います (location + existence)
G5: Sentence-ending particles ね and よ

weekly_content.title: Ch.4 Review + Ch.5 Japanese Homes begins
content: G1: この、その、あの、どの (demonstrative adjectives) pp.178-181
G2: Location nouns (中、そと、となり、よこ、ちかく、うしろ、まえ、上、下、みぎ、ひだり)
grammar: G1: この、その、あの、どの (demonstrative adjectives for modifying nouns)
G2: Location nouns (中、外、隣、横、近く、後ろ、前、上、下、右、左)

weekly_content.title: Ch.5 continued — の pronoun, distance/duration, は vs が
content: G4: から、まで, ～ぐらい/くらい (distance and duration) pp.190-192
G5: Topic marker は vs subject marker が, double particles, も pp.193-198
grammar: G3: の as pronoun (replacing previously mentioned noun)
G4: から、まで (from/to), ～ぐらい/くらい (approximately)
G5: は vs が distinction, double particles, も with other particles

weekly_content.title: Ch.5 Review + Ch.6 Leisure Time begins
content: G1: Particles と and に pp.222-226
G2: Polite past adjectives and copula verb です pp.227-229
G3: て-form of verbs — connecting phrases and making requests pp.230-233
G4: て-form of verbs and adjectives — connecting phrases pp.234-236
grammar: G1: と (with/and) and に (indirect object/purpose)
G2: Polite past adjectives + でした (copula past)
G3: て-form of verbs (connecting, requests ～てください)
G4: て-form of adjectives (connecting adjective phrases)

weekly_content.title: Ch.6 continued — Invitations, listening, reading
content: G5: ませんか (extending invitations) pp.237-240
grammar: G5: ～ませんか (extending invitations — Won't you...?)

weekly_content.title: Ch.6 culture, integration, review + Oral exam practice
